measurements.label: CASEWORK, TRIM, TOILET ACCESSORIES, ETC., AS APPLICABLE.
measurements.notes: The label "CASEWORK, TRIM, TOILET ACCESSORIES, ETC., AS APPLICABLE." is a general note/specification reference, not an actual room. The crop is essentially blank with no visible walls, only a scale label "3/8\"=1'-0\"" at top, a stray dimension "2'-11 1/4\"" at right edge, and "POR..." text. No enclosed room can be measured. The first-pass 4044 sqft estimate is not meaningful here. Cannot determine room dimensions because this is not a room.

measurements.label: KITCHEN 101
measurements.notes: Image crop appears blank — no visible walls or label. Relied entirely on the dimension callout list. The 11'-5 3/4" and 7'-5 1/2" callouts are the closest to crop center (offsets ~0.16) and are reasonable single-room dimensions for a kitchen. Larger values (38'-6 1/4", 57'-8") are clearly overall building dimensions. Smaller fragments (3'-7 3/4", 3'-11 1/4", 2'-8 1/2", etc.) are likely partition or door widths. Confidence reduced because the crop image itself is not legible for verification.

The crop appears blank — no visible walls, room label "100", or interior geometry can be identified within the image. Dimension callouts are all clustered along the top and left edges of the crop (offsets near -0.45 to -0.47), suggesting the room itself lies outside the visible content area or the image rendering failed. Without being able to see walls enclosing the labeled position, I cannot reliably match any pair of callouts to this room's overall length and width. Reporting as estimated with very low confidence; the first-pass geometric estimate of 23 sqft is noted but not actionable.

The cropped image is essentially blank — no visible walls, room label, or geometry for room 104 can be discerned. Only a faint scale annotation appears in the upper right. Without visible walls or a clear match between callouts and this room's bounding dimensions, I cannot reliably assign width/height. Callouts include a range of values (e.g., 13'-0", 10'-0 1/4", 6'-5 1/2", 4'-5 1/2", 3'-11 1/2") but none can be confidently paired as this room's overall L×W. The first-pass geometric estimate of 11 sqft also suggests the room outline wasn't captured. Recommend re-cropping with the room walls and label visible.

measurements.label: A-200
measurements.notes: The crop does not show a room labeled "A-200" — it shows a "DOOR FRAMING" detail at 3/8" = 1'-0" scale, depicting a header, king studs, jack stud, and treated bottom plate. This is a construction detail diagram, not a floor plan room. No room walls are visible at the crop center, and the dimension callouts provided appear to reference a separate floor plan elsewhere. No measurement can be derived for a "room" here.

The crop image does not show the room itself — it only shows a fragment of a "DOOR FRAMING" detail title in the upper right and is otherwise blank. The room labeled "112" is not visible in the provided image. Callouts listed are all horizontal-orientation, making it impossible to confirm which represent width vs. height for room 112. Provided values are a low-confidence guess based on the 16'-10 1/2" callout closest to crop center; geometric estimate of 4044 sqft appears to be for the entire building, not this single room. Recommend re-cropping the image around room 112.

Image crop appears blank — no visible walls or label. Inferred dimensions from callouts: the 16'-10 1/2" horizontal callout below the room appears to be the overall length, and the 6'-4 1/4" vertical callout is the largest vertical dimension near center, likely the room depth. The horizontal sub-dimensions (3'-11 1/2" + 3'-5 1/4" + 4'-3 1/4" + others) sum approximately to the 16'-10 1/2" overall, supporting that interpretation. First-pass 4044 sqft estimate appears to be an outlier and was not used. Confidence reduced due to inability to visually confirm room shape.

measurements.label: MASTER BATH
measurements.notes: Image crop appears blank, so relying entirely on the dimension callout list. Best candidates for overall room dimensions are 16'-10 1/2" (16.88 ft) and 12'-0 1/4" (12.02 ft), both centered horizontally near the room. The smaller callouts (2'-7 1/2", 3'-0 3/4", 4'-2", 3'-11 1/2") appear to be sub-dimensions for fixtures/partitions. The 17'-5 1/2" likely includes wall thickness or an adjacent space. Perimeter ≈ 57.8 ft × 9 ft × 0.93 ≈ 484 sqft wall area.

The crop image is essentially blank — no visible room walls, label, doors, or windows can be discerned. Only the scale notation is faintly visible in the upper right. Dimension callouts are provided as text, but without visible geometry I cannot confidently match a pair to represent this room's overall width and height. The 16'-10 1/2" callout appears to be a likely overall horizontal dimension for the room, but no vertical/short-axis callout is provided (all callouts are horizontal orientation). The first-pass geometric estimate of 4044 sqft seems implausibly large for a typical labeled room and likely reflects the crop bounds, not the room. Recommend re-cropping with visible walls and a vertical dimension callout to refine.

Image crop appears blank — no visible walls or label. Relied on dimension callouts. The horizontal callout 17'-5 1/2" centered at offset (0, 0.48) likely represents the room's overall width along the bottom. The vertical dimensions on the left side sum: 7.94 + 7.08 + 3.83 ≈ 18.85 ft (total wall run), but 16'-10 1/2" (16.88 ft) appears as a horizontal callout near the room center which may be an alternate overall. Best match for overall room: 17.46 ft × 16.88 ft. The first-pass estimate of 4044 sqft seems to encompass a larger area; using printed callouts gives ~295 sqft which is more typical for a single room. Confidence reduced due to inability to visually verify.
